# mind² ECHO

> mind² ECHO is an AI meeting analysis app that transcribes on your device, separates speakers automatically, and builds a mind² (DISG/DISC) communication profile plus concrete, evidence-backed coaching tips for each person. Audio never leaves your phone. GDPR-compliant.

## Pages
- [Home](https://mind2-echo.toowoxx.de/en): what mind² ECHO does
- [FAQ](https://mind2-echo.toowoxx.de/en/faq): common questions and answers ([Markdown](https://mind2-echo.toowoxx.de/en/faq.md))
- [Privacy policy](https://mind2-echo.toowoxx.de/en/privacy)
- [Imprint](https://mind2-echo.toowoxx.de/en/imprint)

- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.dr_thumm.mind2.echo)
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/de/app/mind-echo/id6758762014)
